allow: PowerShell(if \(Test-Path "e:/Swaseekh-main/Swaseekh-main/scripts/data/answers/ch10.json"\) { try { $j = Get-Content "e:/Swaseekh-main/Swaseekh-main/scripts/data/answers/ch10.json" -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $count = \($j.PSObject.Properties | Measure-Object\).Count; Write-Output "EXISTS count=$count" } catch { Write-Output "EXISTS but parse failed" } } else { Write-Output "NOT EXISTS" })
